name: TRUTH-MD WhatsApp Bot
description: Feature-rich WhatsApp bot. Users visit the web UI, pair their number, and the bot runs commands automatically.

SESSION_ID.description: WhatsApp session credential string (TRUTH-MD:~xxxxx). Leave blank to pair via the web UI on first boot.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp number with country code, no + (e.g. 263771234567). Grants owner-level commands.

BOT_NAME.description: Display name shown by the bot
